baseline.notes: Run 32 set the F1 ceiling at 0.396 (TP 82 / FN 74 / FP 176). Precision 0.318 is the bottleneck — prompt/gate iteration exhausted. Run 33 introduces YOLO spatial grounding gate to cut FPs on throw_in/corner_kick/goal_kick where the ball isn’t near the required landmark.

notes: Run #33 — YOLO HYBRID breakthrough. YoloGrounder runs YOLOv8 on 3 frames around each tentative event and rejects throw_in/corner_kick/goal_kick that lack the required ball position (touchline / corner / goal line). Fail-open on no-ball-detected. Expected FP cut ~30-50% on the three gated types; other types unchanged. Corner detection unblocked.
